consistency.class_match: The feature is correctly attributed to the 'sorcerer' class.
consistency.level_match: Level 20 is the standard capstone level for primary class features.
consistency.naming_convention: The slug and name ('Sorcerous Restoration') are thematic and clear.

quality.description_clarity: The description is precise: 'At 20th level, you regain 4 expended sorcery points whenever you finish a short rest.'
quality.completeness: The data captures all necessary mechanical aspects (level, effect, resource affected).

mechanics.effect: Regains 4 Sorcery Points on a Short Rest.
mechanics.power_level: Appropriate for a 20th-level capstone ability. It significantly enhances the core resource regeneration for a Sorcerer, making short rests much more valuable.
mechanics.comparison: This is the standard, official capstone feature for the Sorcerer class in D&D 5th Edition.
